    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M O P S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    C

    Client - Class in model
    Model class tha contains necessary information about clients.
    Client() - Constructor for class model.Client
     
    Client(String) - Constructor for class model.Client
     
    ClientBLL - Class in businessLayer
    ClientBLL contains methods to add, delete, and update clients.
    ClientBLL() - Constructor for class businessLayer.ClientBLL
     
    ClientDAO - Class in dataAccessLayer
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with Clients.
    ClientDAO() - Constructor for class dataAccessLayer.ClientDAO
     
    ClientPanel - Class in presentation
    ClientPanel gets displayed when the user presses the Clients button in the SidePanel.
    ClientPanel() - Constructor for class presentation.ClientPanel
     
    close(Connection) - Static method in class connection.ConnectionFactory
    Close functions are used to close the open connections, statements, and resultsets.
    close(ResultSet) - Static method in class connection.ConnectionFactory
     
    close(Statement) - Static method in class connection.ConnectionFactory
     
    closeConnections(ResultSet, PreparedStatement, Connection) - Method in class dataAccessLayer.LogDAO
    For closing connections, statements and resultsets.
    connection - package connection
     
    ConnectionFactory - Class in connection
    ConnectionFactory contains classes that realise the connection to the MySQL database.
    Controller - Class in presentation
    Controller class manages the logic behind the GUI.
    Controller(View) - Constructor for class presentation.Controller
